name: No-Bake Almond Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate and butterscotch chips in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Heat on high power in the microwave oven for 1 to 2 minutes, or until smooth and melted when stirred.
3. Stir in powdered sugar, sour cream, lemon peel, and salt until smooth.
4. Blend in wafer crumbs. Refrigerate for 15 to 20 minutes, or until firm.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls; then roll in chopped almonds.
6. Store in a covered container in the refrigerator. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen.
